title: Unsupported decoder error in Crypto node
symptom: When using the Crypto node to hash a string, n8n throws 'error:1E08010C:DECODER routines::unsupported'. This indicates an issue with the provided key or input format.
applies_when: Providing an invalid key or input format
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different context
root_cause: The error occurs when the Crypto node is provided with an invalid key format or an unsupported operation. The key must be in the correct format for the Crypto node to process it successfully.
fix_steps: Ensure the private key is in the correct format (PEM format)
Double-check the input parameters being passed to the Crypto node
Test with a known valid key and input
agent_instruction: Verify that the private key is in the correct format and check the input parameters.
